title: trifolium carolinianum
intro: Trifolium carolinianum, also known as Carolina clover, is a perennial legume plant native to the southeastern United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Trifolium carolinianum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
